# Upgrade paths — "Punch Up the Zingers"

*Auto-generated from `src/data/cards.ts` — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `npm run upgrades`.*

Every chain is **linear** (no branching): base → ➕ tier 1 → ➕➕ tier 2. Most cards have
ONE authored tier so far; flagship chains go two deep. Reward-tier cards get one extra
tier on top of their already-premium stats — the "draft it, then punch it up into a
super-card" arc. Stat curve: signature predicates ±3 → ±4 (cap +4) → ±5 (cap +6);
signature subjects ×1.3 → ×1.6 (cap +3) → ×1.9 (cap +5); rewards ±4 → ±5 (cap +6).

**Chains: 78 · upgraded defs: 153 · two-tier chains: 75**

## Signature brags
- **will personally fight a bear for your freedom** (+3)
  - ➕ will personally suplex a grizzly bear to protect our democracy (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will personally fistfight an asteroid to protect this nation (+5, cap +6)
- **bench-presses small fishing boats before breakfast** (+3)
  - ➕ deadlifts small cars as a warmup (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ once towed a cruise ship into harbor with a jump rope (+5, cap +6)
- **could fix the whole economy with a single phone call** (+3)
  - ➕ could balance the federal budget on a napkin at Waffle House (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ once fixed a recession by glaring at it (+5, cap +6)
- **is never wrong about anything, ever** (+3)
  - ➕ has never lost an argument, a bet, or a game of rock-paper-scissors (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ has been correct about every issue, including several that have not happened yet (+5, cap +6)
- **has the handshake of a champion and the hair of a statesman** (+3)
  - ➕ has a jawline that has been declared a national landmark (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ has the handshake of a president, the jawline of a monument, and approval ratings of free pizza on a snow day (+5, cap +6)
- **has the courage of ten senators and the humility of eleven** (+3)
  - ➕ has the courage of a thousand soldiers and the humility to mention it only constantly (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ has the bravery of a warrior and a humility so heroic it should be carved into a mountain (+5, cap +6)
- **will direct our nation's scientists to make the last 10% of a phone battery last longer** (+3)
  - ➕ will direct NASA to make the stars brighter and your cell phone service 20% faster (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will direct our nation's scientists to invent a time machine, travel back to 1984, and convince Van Halen to record a Christmas album (+5, cap +6)
- **once talked a hurricane into changing course** (+3)
  - ➕ once negotiated a ceasefire between two tornadoes (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ once ended a drought with a single stern warning (+5, cap +6)
- **personally returned a lost wallet on live television** (+3)
  - ➕ helped an old lady cross eight consecutive streets (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ has rescued more kittens than a dozen fire departments (+5, cap +6)
- **is a once-in-a-generation genius** (+2)
  - ➕ is the smartest human being currently permitted by law (+3)
  - ➕➕ once finished the Sunday crossword in pen, in the rain, in four minutes (+4, cap +4)
- **memorized every ZIP code in this country, out of respect** (+3)
  - ➕ knows every American's name, birthday, and preferred barbecue sauce (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ is on a first name basis with every bald eagle in the country (+5, cap +6)
- **assembles IKEA furniture with no leftover screws, on the first try** (+3)
  - ➕ once untangled a box of Christmas lights in a single pull (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ has successfully folded a fitted sheet on more than one occasion (+5, cap +6)

- **will deliver free ice cream every Friday** (+3)
  - ➕ will install a soft-serve machine in every home (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will make every meal come with free dessert and no calories (+5, cap +6)

  - ➕ attends every American's little-league game, cheering the loudest (+3)

  - ➕➕ will add a secret bonus month of paid vacation between July and August (+5, cap +6)

  - ➕ will replace Monday and Wednesday with extra Saturdays (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will abolish Monday and replace it with National Weekly Pancake Day (+5, cap +6)
- **will personally refund your last parking ticket** (+3)
  - ➕ will erase every late fee you've ever been charged, with interest (+4, cap +4)

- **promises shorter lines at the DMV, forever** (+3)
  - ➕ will make every government form fit on one page, front only (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will abolish hold music and replace it with a polite and well-spoken human who answers immediately (+5, cap +6)
- **will put a coffee shop on every single corner** (+2)
  - ➕ will install a personal barista in every kitchen (+3)
  - ➕➕ will make refills free everywhere, forever (+4, cap +4)
- **will build a shining city on a hill** (+3)
  - ➕ will build a shining city on every hill (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will build so many shining cities on so many hills that our great nation will be visible from outer space (+5, cap +6)
- **will light a thousand points of light across this great land** (+3)
  - ➕ will add a second moon and fourteen more stars to the night sky (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will give this nation a second proudly shining sun, just like Tatooine (+5, cap +6)
- **will put the national anthem in a key normal people can actually sing** (+3)

  - ➕ will make every crosswalk button actually do something (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕➕ will require every "unsubscribe" button to actually work, the first time (+5, cap +6)

## Signature subjects & objects
- **My position, which is the best position, believe me,** (+1, ×1.3)

  - ➕ My campaign, which is objectively perfect and legally beyond criticism, (+1, ×1.6, cap +3)

  - ➕ My plan, which fits on one index card in large, confident letters, (+1, ×1.3)
  - ➕➕ My foolproof plan, which history has already endorsed unanimously, (+1, ×1.6, cap +3)
- **My gut, which has frankly never once been wrong** (+1, ×1.3)

## Reward cards (one extra tier → super-card)
- **is secretly a lizard person** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ is a space alien sent to destroy our nation from within (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ is a soulless lizard-centipede hybrid merely disguised as human to trick our fair nation into self-destruction (-6, cap +8)
- **wants to cancel Christmas forever** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ wants to replace Christmas morning with a mandatory tax audit (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ wants to replace Christmas and snow days with tax audits, standardized testing, and boiled Brussels sprouts (-6, cap +8)
- **is the greatest leader in human history** (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕ is the greatest leader in human history, including several histories yet to be written (+5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ is a leader great enough to be added to Mount Rushmore, replacing all four existing faces (+6, cap +8)
- **personally cured a deadly disease last Tuesday** (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will cure hangnails and the common cold (+5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will bring eternal health and happiness to everyone (+6, cap +8)
- **will give every citizen a pony and a tax cut** (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will make every citizen independently wealthy (+5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will deliver wealth, happiness, and free snow cones to every citizen (+6, cap +8)
- **has never once told the truth, not even by accident** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ couldn't tell the truth by reading it off a cue card (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ is deathly allergic to truth, courage, common decency, and returning shopping carts (-6, cap +8)
- **secretly bills the taxpayer for a solid-gold toilet** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ uses taxpayer money to fly private jets to play mini-golf (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ flushes taxpayer money down a solid-gold toilet while flying private jets to private billionaire-only disc golf tournaments (-6, cap +8)
- **personally invented the pop-up ad** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ has a plan to add a tip prompt to grocery store self-checkout stations (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ has a secret scheme to add an unskippable ad break to the national anthem (-6, cap +8)
- **wants to put a coin slot on the Statue of Liberty** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will put a pop-up ad on the Statue of Liberty (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will replace the Statue of Liberty's torch with hamburger from whichever fast food restaurant pays the most bribe money (-6, cap +8)
- **will personally slap every voter in this audience across the face with a rubber chicken** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will give a wedgie to every voter in this audience and then slap them across the face with a rubber chicken (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will personally slap every voter across the face with a rubber chicken, make a rude hand gesture, and then fart in their general direction (-6, cap +8)
- **bench-presses a full-grown bald eagle before breakfast** (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕ bench-presses two full-grown bald eagles before breakfast (+5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ bench-presses two full-grown bald eagles before breakfast, while they salute (+6, cap +8)
- **believes that freedom should have a monthly subscription** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will make constitutional rights an in-app purchase (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will make the Bill of Rights available only as a part of a Disney+ premium subscription bundle (-6, cap +8)
- **will sell this country to a Florida timeshare scheme** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will sell our national parks to a self-storage conglomerate (-5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will replace the Statue of Liberty's torch with a rotating casino sign (-6, cap +8)
- **has a secret plan to make happiness illegal** (-4, cap +4)
  - ➕ wants to require a permit for birthday parties (-5, cap +6)
- **will fix the ending of Game of Thrones in a way that satisfies everyone** (+4, cap +4)
  - ➕ will fix Daylight Saving Time and the ending of Game of Thrones in a way that satisfies everyone (+5, cap +6)
  - ➕➕ will reform Daylight Saving Time, fix the endings of Game of Thrones, Lost, and How I Met Your Mother in a way that satisfies everyone, and produce a new Star Wars trilogy that everyone agrees is awesome (+6, cap +8)

## Skipped by design (33 cards)

Connectors, finishers, and power-ups don't upgrade: a multiplier bump with no funnier
text is against the design north star.
